subcodes.first_line: O Abá'l-Ḥasan! By My life, the portal of delight hath indeed been flung open through the key of My Name, the All-Forgiving, in days wherein He hath willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن لعمری قد فتح باب السرور بمفتاح اسمی الغفور فی ایام فیها اراد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
